小技巧，如何在 GitHub Copilot 的 Agent 中避免老是确认权限，类似于 claude --dangerously-skip-permissions

在 Settings -> Claude Agent: Allow Dangerously Skip Permissions 中勾选 Allow bypass permissions mode. Recommended only for sandboxes with no internet access. https://t.co/iJSdWvH9h9
RT @ctjlewis: This place has been annoying as fuck recently. At least it’s no longer some schizo secret that 80% of “launch” traction has b…

Building a remote for codex (swift app). 

I can fully control the Codex app. 

Simple interface for talking to my codex with all my skills, dangerously skip permissions by default, in app browser so I can vibecode from my phone and open preview links. 

Connection process is https://t.co/GpOLCbcHdf

I am not releasing this, and I used a decent from the remodex repo (it’s open sourced). 

I want this app to be as simple as possible while giving full conteol over codex
Here is where I got the idea and this project is open source too.

有点F1的感觉
